name: The Bank Of Charlotte County
description_short: The Bank of Charlotte County is a full-service community bank founded in 1912 in Virginia, offering consumer and business banking, loans, deposits, and insurance services.
description_long:
The Bank of Charlotte County (formerly Bank of Phenix, Inc.) was founded in 1912 by R. S. Chamberlayne, Jr., who served as president for 60 years. The bank has remained in continuous operation since its founding and is notably one of the few banks in Southside Virginia that remained open during the Great Depression of the 1930s, earning it the nickname "The Old Reliable." The bank's main office location in Phenix has remained unchanged since 1912, making it the oldest continuously operated business in the Town of Phenix. It will celebrate its 114th year of operation in November 2026.

The Bank of Charlotte County offers a comprehensive array of financial products and services including consumer and business banking with loans and deposits, insurance quotes, title insurance, broker and financial management services, ATMs, online banking, bill pay, mobile banking, remote deposit, electronic statements, debit cards, credit cards, merchant services, and 24-hour telephone banking. The bank operates as a full-service, independent community bank with physical locations in South Hill, South Boston, Farmville, and Forest.

The bank distinguishes itself through its strong community banking philosophy, Five-Star ratings from Bauer Financial Reports (the highest rating given), and its commitment to local community organizations through employee volunteer efforts and resource allocation. Leadership has remained stable and experienced, with the current President and CEO Dabney T. P. Gilliam, Jr. taking office on July 1, 2016. The bank emphasizes core values of honesty, integrity, candor, communication, consistency, accountability, and dedication.

As a traditional community bank, The Bank of Charlotte County is best suited for customers seeking personalized service from an established, financially strong institution with deep local roots. However, prospective customers should note that it operates primarily in the Southside Virginia region and may have more limited digital innovation compared to larger national banks or neobanks.
services: Insurance quotes (home, auto, personal coverage via Bearing Insurance)
pros: FDIC-insured with continuous operation since 1912 and strong Five-Star rating from Bauer Financial Reports
Survived the Great Depression and remained open when most banks failed, earning "The Old Reliable" reputation
Full-service banking including consumer and business loans, deposits, online banking, mobile banking, and bill pay
Offers integrated financial services including insurance quotes, title insurance, and broker/financial management
Strong community commitment with documented employee volunteer efforts and support for local organizations
Multiple convenient locations across Southside Virginia (South Hill, South Boston, Farmville, Forest)
24-hour telephone banking and remote deposit capabilities for account access
cons: Limited geographic footprint restricted primarily to Southside Virginia region, not a national bank
Website content does not specify current interest rates, fees, or APR information for products
No mention of specialized digital banking features, fintech integrations, or modern app functionality beyond basic mobile banking
Limited information about business loan products, SBA offerings, or commercial lending terms
No disclosure of current account minimums, overdraft fees, or other standard banking charges
best_for: Local business owners and entrepreneurs in Southside Virginia seeking personalized community banking relationships
Customers who prioritize bank stability and long-term track record over digital innovation
Individuals seeking integrated banking and insurance services from a single local institution
Residents of South Hill, South Boston, Farmville, and Forest who value locally-rooted banking
diagnosis: The Bank of Charlotte County is best for established local customers and small business owners in Southside Virginia who prioritize community relationships, financial stability, and personalized service from a bank with 112+ years of continuous operation. Primary caveat: geographic limitation to Southside Virginia region and lack of detail about competitive rates, digital features, and specific product terms on the website.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
